# PrivChain
> x402-compatible privacy infrastructure for agent-to-agent and agent-to-service payments.

Canonical site: https://privchain.io
Sitemap: https://privchain.io/sitemap.xml
Robots: https://privchain.io/robots.txt

## Primary Pages
- Homepage: https://privchain.io/
- API surface: https://privchain.io/api.html
- Developer status: https://privchain.io/developers.html
- Resources: https://privchain.io/resources.html
- Security summary: https://privchain.io/security.html
- FAQ: https://privchain.io/faq.html
- Signup funnel: https://privchain.io/signup.html
- Architecture: https://privchain.io/architecture.html
- Mission: https://privchain.io/mission.html
- Contract economy: https://privchain.io/contract-economy.html
- Privacy policy: https://privchain.io/privacy.html
- Terms of use: https://privchain.io/terms.html

## Markdown Corpus (AI-friendly)
- Overview: https://privchain.io/ai/overview.md
- API surface: https://privchain.io/ai/api-surface.md
- Integration guidance: https://privchain.io/ai/integration.md
- Security and operations: https://privchain.io/ai/security-and-operations.md
- Full consolidated context: https://privchain.io/llms-full.txt

## Scope and Boundaries
- Public content is interface-level and partner-readiness level.
- Launch-critical internals (proof internals, anti-abuse thresholds, production runbooks) are intentionally withheld pre-release.
- Analytics is consent-gated; essential functionality remains available without analytics consent.
